name: profile-al-development
description: Lead-as-Manager AL development for Business Central with agent teams. Main session acts as engineering manager, spawning specialist teammates for parallel work. Competitive solution design (2-3 architects debate approaches), parallel implementation (N developers on different modules), parallel code review (4 specialists: security, AL expert, performance, test coverage), parallel test development (4 engineers: unit, integration, scenario, edge case). Skills: interview, plan, develop, fix, test, document, compile, publish, run-tests, al-mutate, al-symbols, bc-source, local-bc, verify-tests. MCP integration (BC Intelligence, MS Docs, AL Dependency, ALCOPS, BCTB).
